articles.title: Parole rate is up in Mass., including for people with life sentences
articles.description:
“A different group of people are coming before the Parole Board, largely because of the Mattis decision,” said lawyer Ryan Schiff.

The post Parole rate is up in Mass., including for people with life sentences appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Parole rates in Massachusetts have increased, affecting life sentence inmates significantly.
Lawyer Ryan Schiff attributes this change to the recent Mattis decision.
Boston residents may see more formerly incarcerated individuals reintegrating into the community.
